---
title: "Mansi Budamagunta"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mansi-budamagunta/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mansi-budamagunta
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:b.mansi12@gmail.com"
    - text: CV
      url: "Mansi_Budamagunta_CV.pdf"
---

## Bio

I'm a data scientist with a research background who applies computational methods to study complex real-world problems at the intersection of data and public interest. I've worked across several domains — including LLM training pipelines for leading AI labs, urban data analytics, transportation networks, and computational neuroscience. I am currently completing an MSc in Applied Data Science at Utrecht University, where my thesis examines EU research funding through computational text analysis.
